description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow surrounded by a low wooden picket fence, featuring a dark gabled roof with visible shingles. The front facade includes a central door flanked by two windows and an attached garage on the left side. The rear side has two large windows and a back door, while the side elevations show a mix of small and medium-sized windows, some of which appear boarded or covered. The structure is compact and rectangular, with a modest footprint and a simple, functional design. The exterior is primarily composed of dark brickwork, with wooden and glass elements for doors and windows. The overall appearance suggests a practical suburban home, suitable for a small family in an urban neighborhood.
description: A single-story brick bungalow with a dark gabled roof, central front door, attached garage, and surrounded by a wooden picket fence. The design is compact and functional, with a mix of windows and doors on all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two windows, and an attached garage to the left, all enclosed by a wooden picket fence.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gabled roof, a small window, and the side of the garage, with the fence running parallel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two large windows and a back door, with the fence fully enclosing the backyard area.
description_view_3: Right side view showing two small windows and the side elevation of the house, with the fence continuing along the perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and rear windows
